prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2024年最低位次分别为30→35→37→23名，整体在极高分段位次区间波动，2024年明显前移至23名，显示该校在青海省理科顶尖考生中吸引力强劲；2021年计划2人，2022–2024年均为1人，2026年计划仍为1人，招生规模极小且连续多年持平，计划稳定对位次影响中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及学术不端事件（学生私吞竞赛奖金、撤稿量较高等），可能对部分考生报考心理产生轻微抑制；抖音热度为较热（上海交通大 学总排名第42），整体曝光度较高；临床医学为A+学科（第五轮学科评估），口腔医学A+、生物学A+等，与招生专业临床医学（八年制本博连读）高度匹配，学 科实力全国顶尖，对高分考生吸引力极强；985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；上海交通大学软科主榜2026年排名第4（全国Top5），医学院作为其核心组成部分，办学层次与声誉均为国内顶尖。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学专业2024年社会热度为推荐，虽较2023年小幅降温但仍属偏热；青海省2025年 物理类考生约30457人，2026年总考生约48000人（不确定），按历史比例估算物理类约31200人，考生规模基本稳定；上 海交通大学医学院位于上海市，地域吸引力强；该校在青海省招生人数极少（仅1人），属于跨省优质生源竞争，本地无特殊倾斜。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2024年位次前移至23名 的强势表现、2026年招生计划持平、学校顶尖层次与临床医学A+学科的持续吸引力，以及声誉偏负面带来的轻微抑制效应，预计2026年最低位次在23名基准上小幅后移至26名左右 ，区间23–29名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 该校在青海省理科仅招收临床医学（八年制本博连读）1人，位次需在全省前30名左右方有较大把握。预测位次26名（区间23–29名），建议位次在23名以内的考生可积极冲刺， 位次在26–29名的考生可尝试报考但需做好备选方案。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2024, the minimum rankings were 30 → 35 → 37 → 23, fluctuating within a very high score range, with a significant forward shift to 23 in 2024, indicating strong appeal among top science students in Qinghai Province; the enrollment plan was 2 in 2021, 1 from 2022 to 2024, and remains 1 in 2026, with a very small and stable scale over multiple years, having a neutral impact on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents (students embezzling competition bonuses, relatively high retraction rates, etc.), which may slightly suppress some candidates' application intentions; Douyin popularity is relatively high (Shanghai Jiao Tong University ranks 42nd overall), with overall high exposure; Clinical Medicine is an A+ discipline (fifth round of discipline evaluation), Stomatology A+, Biology A+, etc., highly matching the enrollment major of Clinical Medicine (eight-year combined bachelor's and doctoral program), with top national disciplinary strength, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates; it is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; Shanghai Jiao Tong University ranks 4th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking (top 5 nationally), and its School of Medicine, as a core component, has top domestic school level and reputation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the social popularity of the Clinical Medicine major is recommended, though slightly cooled compared to 2023, it remains relatively hot; in 2025, Qinghai Province has approximately 30,457 physics category candidates, and in 2026, the total number of candidates is about 48,000 (uncertain), with an estimated physics category of about 31,200 based on historical proportions, showing a basically stable candidate scale; Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine is located in Shanghai, with strong regional appeal; the school enrolls very few students in Qinghai Province (only 1), representing cross-provincial competition for high-quality students, with no special local preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong performance of the 2024 ranking moving forward to 23, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the sustained appeal of the school's top level and Clinical Medicine A+ discipline, along with the slight suppression effect from the negative reputation, it is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly shift back to around 26 based on the 23 benchmark, with a range of 23–29.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

- None currently
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: This school only enrolls 1 student in Clinical Medicine (eight-year combined bachelor's and doctoral program) in Qinghai Province's science category, requiring a ranking around the top 30 in the province for a higher chance. The predicted ranking is 26 (range 23–29). It is recommended that candidates with rankings within 23 actively apply, while those with rankings between 26–29 may try but should prepare alternative plans.
